knowledge.insight: Hackney: 'One partner needs to do 80 percent of the fishing and the other is the support person - handling the net, unhooking fish, culling. Pride causes more teams to lose buddy tournaments than any other factor.'
Hackney: 'The support person takes the bass off the hook, puts it in the livewell, and handles culling. This lets the leader fish most of the time and catch more bass.'
